mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
    A[Literature Review] --> B[Hypothesis Formation]
    B --> C[Study Design]
    C --> D[Data Collection]
    C --> E[Ethical Approval]
    D --> F[Data Analysis]
    E --> F
    F --> G[Results Interpretation]
    G --> H[Publication]
    
    style A fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd
    style B fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#7b1fa2
    style C fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#f57c00
    style D fill:#e8f5e8,stroke:#388e3c
    style E fill:#e8f5e8,stroke:#388e3c
    style F fill:#fff9c4,stroke:#f9a825
    style G fill:#fce4ec,stroke:#c2185b
    style H fill:#f1f8e9,stroke:#689f38
